title: Saara Pamba Pola Lyrics Kozhi Koovuthu
stanzas:
saara pamba pola
ye sada kattura alla
ada sala salakara mela
na suthuren thanaala

saami vandhadhu pola
ada vaikira alla
adi yendi intha vezha
na suthuren pinnaala

yen kannala pesa
ada odambezham kusa
eni poo pokkum assa
athu ellaam unnala

kalavani vasam
eni ena suthi vesum
ada thala gani pesum
enaku onnum theriyala

vadi chella kiruki
nenjukuzha vettchen
 unna uruki

vayasa kutti peruki
kuthikiten usura nuzha neruki

saara pamba pola
ye sada kattura alla
ada sala salakara mela
na suthuren thanaala

saami vandhadhu pola
ada vaikira alla
adi yendi intha vezha
na suthuren pinnaala

manasukulla unna nattu vatchen
poothu kaachi kulungara nee
aaththa valatha kozhi kunja pola
pasa thala kothuradi nee

ullangai rekaiya othukira va
unnoda satta pola kattikida va
un pera nenju mela ottikida va
unnakaga ena nane kuthikida va

ye ennaketha vetukari
azhagana sanda kari
vadi vadi vadi
mulusathan unna thaadi

saara pamba pola
ye sada kattura alla
ada sala salakara mela
na suthuren thanaala

saami vandhadhu pola
ada vaikira alla
adi yendi intha vezha
na suthuren pinnaala

adi nee usure.
usure usure.

kana ponen
kandedutha nee than
ithuzha yedhuku
panjayathu than

manasukula maligaiye irukku
oora thandi vadi ulla than

varenda rathiriyil poothu kidaku
melaada meesaikkuthan kathukidakku
yaar ena sonaalum nathan unnaku
oorena sonaalum neethan yennaku

ye jathakatha mathi putten
ooru sanam oochi kotta
varen varen varen
unnaku na thaali katta

saara pamba pola
ye sada kattura alla
ada sala salakara mela
na suthuren thanaala

saami vandhadhu pola
ada vaikira alla
adi yendi intha vezha
na suthuren pinnaala

yen kannala pesa
ada odambezham kusa
eni poo pokkum assa
athu yellam unnala

kalavani vasam
eni ena suthi vesum
ada thala gani pesum
enaku onnum theriyala

theeya yendi siricha
rathiriyil usura neyum  ericha
paaya neeye viricha
Pattunuthaan pasiya
moodi maracha…

enrichedMetadata.faq:
Frequently Asked Questions

What is the meaning of the song 'Saara Pamba Pola'?

The song expresses themes of love and affection, portraying the feelings of the protagonists in a romantic context.

What is the plot context of the song in the movie 'Kozhi Koovuthu'?

In Kozhi Koovuthu, the song highlights a romantic moment between the lead characters, enhancing the emotional depth of their relationship.

Who are the singers and music director of the song?

The song is sung by E.S.Ramraj and Priya Himesh, with music composed by E.S.Ramraj himself.

When was 'Saara Pamba Pola' released?

The song was released on December 28, 2012.
enrichedMetadata.summary: In Saara Pamba Pola, the romantic duet beautifully encapsulates the emotions of love and longing between the characters in Kozhi Koovuthu. The lyrics, penned by Snehan, evoke a sense of joy and affection, making it a perfect fit for celebrations and romantic occasions. The harmonious blend of E.S.Ramraj and Priya Himesh's voices adds a captivating layer to the song. Overall, it conveys a heartfelt message of love that resonates with listeners.
enrichedMetadata.high_ctr_intro: Saara Pamba Pola from the movie Kozhi Koovuthu is a delightful duet that captures the essence of romance with its enchanting lyrics and melodious composition. The collaboration between E.S.Ramraj and Priya Himesh brings a unique charm, making it a must-listen for fans of Tamil music. Dive into this musical journey that beautifully expresses love and joy!
stanzaMeanings: Like a snake, I am not just a simple creature, I am moving around with my own style.
Like a god has come, I am not just a simple thing, I am moving around with my own way.
With my eyes, I speak, like a flower that blooms, all this is because of you.
In the world of deception, I am confused, I don't understand what the head is saying.
I have caught you in my heart, you are my treasure.
I have grown up, I have become a little adult, I am now aware of life.
Like a snake, I am not just a simple creature, I am moving around with my own style.
Like a god has come, I am not just a simple thing, I am moving around with my own way.
In my heart, I have planted you, you are like a chick that is growing up, you are my pride.
You are like a line that is drawn, you are my strength, I will do anything for you.
What is this beautiful thing that has come to me, I will take care of you, I will protect you.
Like a snake, I am not just a simple creature, I am moving around with my own style.
Like a god has come, I am not just a simple thing, I am moving around with my own way.
You are my life, my life, my life.
I have lost my sight, why should I worry about this?
In my heart, there is a palace, it is beyond the village.
In the coming night, if someone asks who is the one to take care of you, I will say it is you.
I have come to this place, I will come, I will come, I will tie the knot for you.
Like a snake, I am not just a simple creature, I am moving around with my own style.
Like a god has come, I am not just a simple thing, I am moving around with my own way.
With my eyes, I speak, like a flower that blooms, all this is because of you.
In the world of deception, I am confused, I don't understand what the head is saying.
You laughed in the night, you are the one who has made me feel alive, you are the one who has made me forget everything...
